products.name: Roblox’s daily users continue to drop as age-checks slow growth
products.summary: Roblox's daily active users continued to slip last quarter due in part to its rollout of age checks on its platform. According to its latest earnings report, Roblox currently has 132 million daily active users globally, down from 144 million at the end of last

products.name: Congress keeps kicking surveillance reform down the road

products.name: Apple’s iPhone revenue jumps to $57 billion despite chip shortages

products.name: Rivian’s revenue is up as R2 production kicks into gear

products.name: Rivian downsizes new EV factory after Trump’s DOE slashes loan agreement
products.summary: Rivian announced some changes today with regard to the factory its building in the state of Georgia. The company was planning to build the facility in two phases, each resulting in 200,000 vehicles of annual production capacity, for a total of 400,000 units. R

products.name: The logic of the racist Supreme Court isn’t adding up

products.name: Microsoft’s Xbox mode is now available for all Windows 11 PCs
products.summary: Microsoft is now rolling out its Xbox mode to all Windows 11 PCs. The new Xbox mode adds a full-screen interface to the Xbox PC app, much like Steam's Big Picture Mode, and originally debuted as the Xbox Full Screen Experience (FSE) with Asus' Xbox Ally device

products.name: Meta threatens to pull its apps from New Mexico if forced to make ‘technologically impractical’ changes

products.name: With Saros, Housemarque makes a case for doing next-gen games differently

products.name: Apple was surprised by AI-driven demand for Macs
products.summary: Apple said it will be supply-constrained on Mac mini, Studio, and Neo in the next quarter, too.

products.name: Legal AI startup Legora hits $5.6B valuation and its battle with Harvey just got hotter
products.summary: The two wildly fast-growing rivals have raised massive sums, pushed into each other's home turf, and now have dueling ad campaigns.
